name: TestGetWaitFrFrameErrorData
title: TestGetWaitFrFrameErrorData
description: If a FlexRay frame error is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the event’s content can be called up with the first function.
The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aFrameError
parameters.description: Event variable that should be filled in with this function.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Number of the "joined event" corresponds with the return value of "testJoin...".

description: For an example see function TestWaitForFrFrame and replace all FrFrame by FrFrameError.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
